PowerShell(python -c "import pymupdf4llm; import inspect; src = inspect.getsource\(pymupdf4llm.to_markdown\); lines = src.split\('\\n'\); [print\(f'{i}: {l}'\) for i,l in enumerate\(lines\) if 'metadata' in l.lower\(\) or 'page' in l.lower\(\) or 'chunk' in l.lower\(\)]")

PowerShell(python -c "import fitz, pymupdf4llm, json; doc = fitz.open\(\); page = doc.new_page\(\); page.insert_text\(\(72, 72\), 'Hello World'\); result = pymupdf4llm.to_markdown\(doc, page_chunks=True, write_images=False, show_progress=False\); [print\('Keys:', list\(c.keys\(\)\), 'Meta:', c.get\('metadata', {}\)\) for c in result]; doc.close\(\)")
